label: Scatter group
description: Defines a weighted group of things to scatter together within a cluster rect.

things.label: Things
things.description: Weighted list of things that can be placed within this group's cluster rect.

stackSizeRange.label: Stack size range
stackSizeRange.description: Random range for the stack count of each placed item.

spawnForbidden.label: Spawn forbidden
spawnForbidden.description: When true, placed items are forbidden from being hauled.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative probability of this group being chosen.

spawnAtCenter.label: Spawn at center
spawnAtCenter.description: ThingDef always placed at the center of the cluster rect.

spawnAtCenterFilthDef.label: Spawn at center filth def
spawnAtCenterFilthDef.description: Filth ThingDef placed at the cluster center alongside the spawnAtCenter thing.

indoorRuin.label: Indoor ruin
indoorRuin.description: When true, this group requires the scatter cell to be inside an existing ruined structure.

coveredCellsPer10Cells.label: Covered cells per 10 cells
coveredCellsPer10Cells.description: Random range of cluster rect cells covered with things, expressed as a count per 10 eligible cells.

filthDef.label: Filth def
filthDef.description: Filth ThingDef spawned around each placed thing in this group.

filthExpandBy.label: Filth expand by
filthExpandBy.description: Number of cells to expand each thing's occupied rect when spawning filth.

filthChance.label: Filth chance
filthChance.description: Probability (0-1) that each eligible cell around a placed thing receives filth.

clusterRectRadius.label: Cluster rect radius
clusterRectRadius.description: Random range for the half-size of the square cluster rect centered on the scatter cell.
